welcomeEmail.subject: Welcome aboard, Alex! Here's what's next
welcomeEmail.body:
Hi Alex,

Welcome to the team! We're thrilled to kick off the Website Redesign project with Rivera Design Studio.

Here's what to expect in the next few days:

1. Kick-off Call — I'll send a calendar invite for next week to align on goals and timeline.
2. Access — You'll receive login credentials for our project dashboard shortly.
3. Timeline — Based on our discussion, we're targeting an April 15 start with a 4-week sprint.

In the meantime, feel free to reply to this email with any questions or materials you'd like us to review before we begin.

Looking forward to creating something great together!

Best regards,
Enes
Automatia BCN
